items.title: Gary Neville defends ‘absolutely monumental’ Jude Bellingham amid England boss Thomas Tuchel’s World Cup comments
items.summary: GARY NEVILLE has thrown his support behind Jude Bellingham after England boss Thomas Tuchel insisted his team were "lucky" to beat Norway. Three Lions gaffer Tuchel admitted he was unhappy with his side's "sloppy" display in the 2-1 win over Norway, which they won in Extra Time after going 1-0 down

items.title: How England finally broke ‘July 11’ curse including infamous Euros final and World Cup semi-final heartbreak
items.summary: JULY 11 has been a terrible day in English footballing history - UNTIL NOW. For the first time in four attempts, the Three Lions have won on what looks like a random date in the British summer. But it has carried heartbreak in the past that most will want to forget. items.summary: ENGLAND found themselves on the receiving end of a bizarre rant after punching their ticket to the World Cup semi-finals.
